title: Bounded AI Delegated Orchestration Status Alignment Execution
objective: Execute the next delegated dual-lane packet after Packet 834 publication by reusing the unchanged authoritative-host helper surface for a fresh admitted-trio live evidence tuple while aligning the higher-level orchestration brief, parallel-readiness checklist, and workflow-first runbook to the published delegated Packet 831 through Packet 834 execution stack under explicit coordinator ownership.
dependency_note: Packet 830 remains the helper-bootstrap-toolchains-python3-path floor, Packet 831 remains the delegated split-governance floor, Packet 832 remains the delegated operator prompt template floor, Packet 833 remains the delegated coordinator closeout template floor, and Packet 834 remains the delegated packet-definition template floor. This packet reuses those preserved contracts to align higher-level orchestration entry surfaces rather than reopening helper hardening or controller scope.
required_inputs: The current recommendation in PROJECT_STATUS.md that the next truthful value is another delegated packet reusing the Packet 831 through Packet 834 stack with a new disjoint lane objective
The delegated ownership, validation, and abort pattern in docs/operations/OLARES-AI-DELEGATED-DUAL-LANE-EXECUTION-CHECKLIST-2026-05-13.md
The reusable operator prompt structure in docs/operations/OLARES-AI-DELEGATED-DUAL-LANE-OPERATOR-PROMPT-TEMPLATE-2026-05-13.md
The reusable coordinator closeout structure in docs/operations/OLARES-AI-DELEGATED-DUAL-LANE-COORDINATOR-CLOSEOUT-TEMPLATE-2026-05-13.md
The reusable delegated packet-definition structure in docs/operations/OLARES-AI-DELEGATED-DUAL-LANE-PACKET-TEMPLATE-2026-05-13.md
The unchanged helper execution surface and focused truthfulness suite
constrained_outputs: One fresh Packet 835 admitted-trio live evidence tuple emitted through tools/ai/run_authoritative_host_packet.py under tests/canary/host-bootstrap-status/actual and tests/canary/mcp-contract/actual

One disjoint higher-level orchestration alignment update limited to docs/operations/OLARES-MVP-AI-ORCHESTRATION-STATUS-BRIEF-2026-05-10.md, docs/operations/OLARES-AI-PARALLEL-TASK-READINESS-CHECKLIST-2026-05-10.md, and docs/architecture/OLARES-AI-WORKFLOW-FIRST-SLICE-RUNBOOK-2026-05-06.md
One coordinator-owned closeout handoff for Packet 835 plus shared status-surface updates only after both lane validations and host parity restoration succeed
An explicit ABORTED closeout instead of partial success if lane ownership drifts, the helper surface requires mutation, or validation fails

lane_a.name: helper-driven live host evidence lane
allowed_actions: run the focused helper truthfulness pytest slice
publish only the Packet 835 artifact tuple emitted by the unchanged helper
forbidden_actions: changing auth, ingress, runtime posture, or business logic

lane_b.name: orchestration entry-surface alignment lane
allowed_actions: align the higher-level orchestration brief with the current delegated Packet 831 through Packet 834 execution stack
align the parallel-readiness checklist with the current delegated template reuse guidance and proof floor
align the workflow-first runbook with the helper-backed delegated execution posture without changing admitted services or runtime boundaries
forbidden_actions: editing live artifact files under tests/canary
changing auth, ingress, runtime posture, admitted services, or business logic

required_combined_checks: both lane-level validation tuples are present
the live helper result is PASS for Packet 835
the host returns to truthful not-running rest state
authoritative-host parity is restored without widening scope

execution_gate: Satisfied after Packet 834 publication and authoritative-host parity restoration on 2026-05-13.
publication_note: Lane A and Lane B validated cleanly, the Packet 835 closeout set was published, and authoritative-host parity was restored at the same clean head using only the bounded generated-artifact blocker remediation authorized by the delegated checklist.
